[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:22.449412 from 'https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/entire/us-gaap-entryPoint-std-2025.xsd' - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\GURE_instance_2023_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0109.9571] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0.49 is used with the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis with a benchmark of us-gaap:CustomerConcentrationRiskMember. This is an invalid benchmark as it is an actual type of risk and not a benchmark. The benchmark should reflect the accounting concept that the risk applies to such as revenues, receivables, loans etc.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2022-01-01 to 2022-03-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=us-gaap:CustomerConcentrationRiskMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9571 Rule version: 29.0.2 - GURE_instance_2023_2025.xml 4044

[DQC.US.0109.9571] The concept us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 with value 0.64 is used with the ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis with a benchmark of us-gaap:CustomerConcentrationRiskMember. This is an invalid benchmark as it is an actual type of risk and not a benchmark. The benchmark should reflect the accounting concept that the risk applies to such as revenues, receivables, loans etc.
The properties of this us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskPercentage1 fact are:
Period :2023-01-01 to 2023-03-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByBenchmarkAxis=us-gaap:CustomerConcentrationRiskMember Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:9571 Rule version: 29.0.2 - GURE_instance_2023_2025.xml 3836
